prestazioni: Engine: TD4 (2.2L diesel, engine code 224DT) – Full hybrid turbo conversion using a Garrett GT2260VK turbocharger (846718-5001S) with a custom BorgWarner EFR 6258 compressor map, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe (Mantech Motorsport) and a custom ECU remap via Viezu K-Suite (Stage 2+ with EGR/DPF delete, targeting 240hp and 420Nm torque).

Suspension: Full Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #DFV 23-2000) with custom valving for the Freelander’s L314 chassis, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) and polybush kit (SuperPro SPF1325K) for subframe reinforcement.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF7J) for the Haldex-based AWD system, upgraded with a custom 4:1 final drive ratio (from a Land Rover Discovery 3) and a Sachs Performance clutch kit (part #3000 951 051) with a lightweight flywheel (Mantech Motorsport, 8.5kg).
estetica: Body: Full widebody conversion using a custom Liberty Walk-inspired kit (fabricated by Overfinch) with carbon fiber fender flares (Seibon CF-LRFL06), extended rocker panels, and a custom front splitter (Rally Art Style, 3D-printed ABS).

Wheels: Rotiform LAS-R 18x9.5 ET25 (front) and 18x10.5 ET20 (rear) with Nitto NT05 tires (255/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear), paired with custom center caps featuring the Land Rover ‘Defender’ badge (replica from JE Motorsport).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim (Ragtop Customs) with red stitching, including dashboard, door cards, and Recaro SRD-9 seats (part #SRD-9-LR-FL) with custom Land Rover ‘Freelander’ embroidery. Full roll cage (Custom Cages, 6-point bolt-in, T45 steel) with harness bar and Sparco 6-point harnesses (part #04558BK).
